title: Random MC
description: A forge mod made for the sake of absolutely random entertainment. Made with MCreator.
body:
Hey!
Random MC adds a whole lot of random things to the game, including, but not limited to:

Bedrock stuff

Admin items

P L A C E H O L D E R

Enderite items

A literal cannon

A larger inventory

Some new paintings


And more!


You would probably only want to play this mod if you like absolutely anything random.


Because of the modding software I use, I am unable to update the mod to later versions as of now.


-Made with MCreator, downloaded at https://www.mcreator.net
